description: Transform the static Service Level Agreement (SLA) document at /home/ga/Documents/SLA_Draft_Sentinels.odt into a dynamic template. Define four User Fields (Variables): 'ClientName' (Value: 'Omicron Industries'), 'ContractDate' (Value: 'October 1, 2025'), 'UptimeTarget' (Value: '99.99%'), and 'ServiceCredit' (Value: '25%'). Replace all text placeholders in the document—specifically '[CLIENT]', '[CLIENT NAME]', or '[Client]' with the 'ClientName' field; '[DATE]' or '[START DATE]' with the 'ContractDate' field; '[UPTIME]' with the 'UptimeTarget' field; and '[CREDIT]' with the 'ServiceCredit' field. Save the automated document as /home/ga/Documents/SLA_Omicron_Final.odt.
